tool_input.old_string:
## Features

### Moments
- Text posts with photo attachments
- Chronological feed (no algorithm)
- Likes and comments
- Edit/delete your own content
- Clean media gallery

### Profiles
- Simple bio (name, avatar, short text, link)
- Posts and media tabs
- Follow/unfollow inside the network

### Network
- Invite-only membership
- Closed internal directory
- No public access or guest viewing

### Notifications
- Likes and comments on your moments
- In-app only (no spam)

### Admin
- Generate invite links
- View/remove members
- Backup and restore database
tool_input.new_string:
## Features

### Moments
- Text posts with photo attachments (up to 6 images)
- Chronological feed (no algorithm)
- Reactions (love, haha, hugs, celebrate)
- Comments with markdown support
- Edit/delete your own content
- Image lightbox with gallery navigation

### Profiles
- Bio, avatar, header/cover image
- Location and website links
- Posts and media tabs

### Circles
- Create private groups within your network
- Share posts with specific circles only
- Manage circle membership

### The Lobby
- Ephemeral group chat room (IRC/AOL vibes)
- Messages disappear after 24 hours
- See who's online, join/leave announcements
- No chat history anxiety — conversations are fleeting

### Network
- Invite-only membership
- Closed member directory
- No public access or guest viewing

### Notifications
- Reactions and comments on your moments
- In-app only (no email spam)

### Admin
- Generate and revoke invite links
- User management (disable, promote, remove)
- Content moderation (delete posts/comments)
- Audit log for accountability
- Customize app name and logo
- Backup and restore database

tool_input.old_string:
## Roadmap

- Video moments
- Shared albums
- Yearly memories
- Sub-circles (groups inside networks)
- Improved admin tools
- Mobile polish
tool_input.new_string:
## Roadmap

- Video moments (30s clips)
- Shared albums
- @ mentions
- Link previews
- Password reset flow
- Dark mode

tool_input.prompt:
**Validation Task: End-to-End Setup Flow**

**Project**: /home/mikekey/Projects/knitly

## Task
Validate the complete setup wizard flow works end-to-end.

## Steps

1. Start server with fresh database:
```bash
cd /home/mikekey/Projects/knitly
rm -f knitly.db
bun run server/src/index.js &
sleep 2
```

2. Verify setup status shows needsSetup: true:
```bash
curl http://localhost:3000/api/setup/status
# Expected: {"needsSetup":true}
```

3. Complete setup via API:
```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/setup/complete \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email":"admin@test.com","password":"password123","username":"admin","displayName":"Admin User"}'
# Expected: User object with role: "admin"
```

4. Verify setup status now shows needsSetup: false:
```bash
curl http://localhost:3000/api/setup/status
# Expected: {"needsSetup":false}
```

5. Verify user has admin role in database (check response from step 3)

6. Stop the server:
```bash
pkill -f "bun run server/src/index.js" || true
```

7. Run type check:
```bash
cd /home/mikekey/Projects/knitly && bun run check
```

8. Run lint:
```bash
cd /home/mikekey/Projects/knitly && bun run lint
```

Report all results and any issues found.
